achievements.title: TV Signage Platform Transformation & Rebuild
achievements.description: Led a Product Manager-level initiative to overhaul the outdated TV signage platform. Phase 1: Proposed a $200 mini PC solution saving $299,000 on hardware for 130 units. Phase 2: Rebuilt the TV signage website from scratch with modern architecture, QR code lead capture, and admin tools, boosting lead generation by 8%.

achievements.title: Custom CMS (ARC) and Corporate Websites Development
achievements.description: Led a team of overseas developers to build and launch a custom Content Management System (ARC) and multiple corporate websites. These platforms power marketing operations supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue by enhancing lead generation, website traffic, and scalability.

achievements.title: Google Maps API Optimization
achievements.description: Strategically optimized the Google Maps API, achieving $50,000 in annual cost savings.

achievements.title: In-House Feature Implementation Savings
achievements.description: Saved $40,000 by implementing website and ARC features in-house, equivalent to eight weeks of agency work.

achievements.title: API Consolidation & Database Optimization
achievements.description: Achieved $4,000 annually in savings by consolidating APIs and optimizing database queries.

achievements.title: Robust Custom Integrations (HubSpot, Zillow, etc.)
achievements.description: Engineered integrations with HubSpot, Zillow, Realtor.com, Facebook, Google Ads, and GA4 using Node.js Express, enhancing lead generation, dynamic advertising, and data synchronization.

achievements.title: Corporate Website & ARC CMS Launch
achievements.description: Spearheaded development and launch of a custom corporate website, doubling PageSpeed Insights scores (30 to 60) and increasing user engagement time by 40%. Delivered ARC CMS, minimizing third-party vendor dependency.

achievements.title: CRM Modules & Marketing Productivity Boost
achievements.description: Designed programmable CRM modules and custom objects in HubSpot, streamlining workflows, automating emails, and boosting marketing productivity by 15%.

achievements.title: Dedicated Redirect Service Website
achievements.description: Developed a dedicated service website for GPH/WH redirects, averting $1,500 in potential costs.

achievements.title: Dynamic Landing Pages & Feeds for Lead Gen
achievements.description: Created dynamic landing pages integrated with HubSpot & TV platforms, and custom feeds for Zillow/Realtor.com, generating a 10% increase in lead generation.

achievements.title: Vendor Dependency Reduction (In-House Development)
achievements.description: Reduced dependency on third-party vendors by taking on in-house development, saving an estimated $30,000 annually. Implemented GIT version control.

achievements.title: Inventory Database Design & Marketing Tools
achievements.description: Designed a new inventory database (BDX XML, MongoDB, SFTP) for dynamic feeds. Developed user-centric marketing tools for exterior packages, floor plans, and room galleries.

achievements.title: HubSpot Rollout Assistance & Custom Objects
achievements.description: Assisted with HubSpot rollout, saving ~$15,000 in contractor costs by handling data transfer from Lasso. Introduced HubSpot custom objects for dynamic pages and advanced reporting.

achievements.title: New Reporting Tools Implementation
achievements.description: Introduced Google Analytics, Data Studio, heatmaps, and HubSpot API reports, improving marketing data clarity by 20%.

achievements.title: Facebook Inventory Sync Program
achievements.description: Built a program to sync inventory with Facebook, replacing Feedonomics and enabling Dynamic Ads.

achievements.title: Marketing & Development Workflow Acceleration
achievements.description: Developed custom WordPress modules, streamlining workflows between marketing and development, accelerating project delivery speed by 10%.

achievements.title: User Behavior Analysis & CTR Increase
achievements.description: Utilized Google Analytics, Ads, and Tag Manager to analyze user behavior, resulting in a 12% increase in click-through rates.

achievements.title: E-commerce Sales Growth (259%)
achievements.description: Drove substantial e-commerce growth by optimizing product listings, leading to a 259% sales increase within the first three months.

achievements.title: Sales Channel Expansion & Revenue Growth (30% YoY)
achievements.description: Expanded sales channels to Amazon EU, eBay, Walmart, Newegg, Shopify, and Magento, increasing revenue by an average of 30% year-over-year.

achievements.title: SEO Strategy for Product Visibility
achievements.description: Developed SEO-focused marketing strategies that boosted product visibility by 18%.
